ADMIN.NO_USERS_AVAILABLE: All users already have credentials for this service.

ADMIN.REGISTRATION_FAILED: Failed to register the service. Check the service configuration.
ADMIN.CONFIRM_GRANT_ACCESS: Are you sure you want to grant this user access to the service?

ADMIN.NO_USERS_WITHOUT_ACCESS: All users already have access to this service.
ADMIN.NO_CREDENTIALS_WARNING: Note: this user has no stored credentials for this service, so they won't be able to log in until credentials are added.
ADMIN.CONFIRM_REVOKE_ACCESS: Are you sure you want to revoke this user's access to the service?

ADMIN.NO_USERS_WITH_ACCESS: No users currently have access to this service.
ADMIN.ADMIN_REVOKE_NO_EFFECT: Note: this user is an admin and bypasses per-service access checks, so revoking has no practical effect on their access.
